user_task_description: This client communication draft contains rushed, overly blunt wording in the message body.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Rewrite the sections labeled `Draft opening` and `Draft ask` so they sound more professional and client-appropriate, while preserving the underlying facts and urgency.
atomic_scope: Only the text editing request is explicit in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document with more professional wording in the specified sections.

inspired_by.title: How much has Copilot changed the way word docs get edited these days?

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Fonts and spacing are inconsistent
- Heading formatting is uneven
- The document layout is visually messy
